status: directional mockup, not final production art
mappingIntent: Tight object-shaped hotspots with visible dead floor between landmarks. Runtime may add small finger tap slop, but should not turn these into broad screen rectangles.

deadZones.reason: Prevents accidental navigation and gives the screen breathing room.
Balcony, banners, chandelier, and wall dressing are ambiance only unless promoted later.
Plants, barrels, stairs, crates, and incidental props should not become hidden buttons.

productionArtCorrections: Push the quest table and loot cache farther inward from the left/right/bottom edges than this V3 draft managed.
Keep bottom drawer and top HUD bands visually calmer, with no essential prop crossing them.
Design the facilities station as one clear workshop landmark, not a general right-wall rectangle.
Keep the core crew desk compact and make the four hero slots readable even before any hero portraits are placed.
